name: Konnectgolf
about: Konnectgolf is an inclusive indoor golf club and simulator venue located in Midtown NYC. The facility features 8 studios equipped with Trackman launch monitors and advanced golf simulation technology, catering to both members and non-members. Konnectgolf offers a comprehensive golf experience that includes play, practice, professional coaching, tournament competition, and corporate events. Membership options are available with different tiers including junior, general, and corporate packages, while non-members can access services through corporate clinics, lessons, and event hosting.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman 4 launch monitor technology with putting software
8 dedicated studios for private, semi-private, and group lessons
Weekly tournament competitions and challenges for prizes and improvement
Spacious bar and lounge area perfect for socializing and networking
Convenient location in Midtown NYC with no need for travel to real courses

food_and_drink.notes: Food and beverage selections available in the lounge area
Full bar available in the lounge area

simulator_hardware.notes: 8 studios equipped with Trackman 4 launch monitors and PuttView putting software

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rentals may be available at the facility. The venue is equipped with Trackman technology that works with any golf clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food and beverage selections in their lounge area. External food and drink policies are not specified, so it's recommended to check with the venue directly.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: With 8 simulation studios and advanced technology, playing 18 holes typically takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Konnectgolf offers junior membership options starting at $425 annually and provides specialized coaching programs for young golfers.
